text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thanks for letting me take the day off yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's been so long since I got the chance to
take my time and talk to my mom on the phone.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Now that I'm all rested, I'll jump right
back into training today as fresh as can be!
